positive: A sophisticated, mystical woodland creature portrait featuring a stylized deer head integrated with luminous, bioluminescent flora and delicate, ethereal butterflies. The deer antlers should branch into glowing crystalline branches and leaves. The creature is rendered in a high-contrast silhouette style against a deep, twilight indigo and emerald green gradient background. Focus on intricate line work, clean separation of elements, and stylized symmetry. The aesthetic should be a blend of Art Nouveau illustration and modern graphic minimalism, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Studio lighting setup emphasizing glow and deep shadows, ultra-detailed, vector art quality.
